推荐场景: 小组讨论｜听懂不同观点
60秒任务: 「听观点」：B1城市任务综合；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: B1综合听力｜主旨+细节｜原因+结果｜行动项｜简单推断
场景族: 街道｜地铁站｜公交站｜出租车｜机场/车站
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
The speaker’s opinion is that ___.（识别观点）
They support the idea because ___.（说明支持原因）
They don’t agree with ___ because ___.（说明反对原因）
I think their main concern is ___.（推断顾虑）
The speaker compares ___ and ___.（识别比较）
They prefer ___, but they understand ___.（转折立场）
That sounds like a reasonable point.（评价观点）
I’m not sure I agree with that.（表达不同意见）
What evidence do they mention?（询问依据）
The example helps explain their opinion.（例子作用）
Maybe they are worried about ___.（推断原因）
So their position is not extreme.（概括立场）
They want a practical solution.（理解意图）
I can summarize their view now.（总结观点）
The main message is ___.（抓主旨）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: opinion, reason, concern, evidence, example, position, solution
Verbs: support, agree, disagree, compare, prefer, mention
Adjectives / Adverbs: reasonable, practical, extreme, main
Time / Place: because of, in the example, at the same time, now
Chunks: speaker’s opinion, main concern, reasonable point, practical solution, summarize their view
